name: TallyBench — Everyday Calculators
description: 40 free calculators covering finance (loan, mortgage, refinance, car loan, rent vs. buy, tax, paycheck, retirement, net worth, savings goal, debt payoff, GST/VAT, SIP/investment), health (BMI, calorie/BMR, macros, pregnancy, ovulation), education (GPA, scientific), and everyday math.
